meaning: A-L-M (three special letters at the start of this chapter)
that (pointing to something far away, feminine) (describes ءَايٰتُ)
of the wise one (describing ٱلْكِتٰبِ - the book)
and as a mercy (connected to هُدًى/guidance)
for those who do good (guidance and mercy for them)
the ritual prayer (object of يُقِيمُونَ - they establish)
and they give/bring forth (connected to يُقِيمُونَ - they establish)
the obligatory charity (that they give يُؤْتُونَ)
they are completely sure (referring to those who establish prayer and give zakah)
those ones there (far away) (subject of هُمُ)
in order to make (someone) go astray (purpose of يَشْتَرِى - he purchases)
any knowledge (used after بِغَيْرِ meaning 'without any')
and he takes/adopts it (سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ) as mockery
as mockery (object of يَتَّخِذَهَا - takes it)
for them (referring to أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ - those people)
it is being recited (to عَلَيْهِ - to him)
upon him (when our verses are recited)
as if (describing how the person acts as if he didn't hear يَسْمَعْهَا)
he hears it (referring to ءَايٰتُنَا - our verses)
so give him good news! (sarcastic command in response to وَلَّىٰ مُسْتَكْبِرًا - he turned away arrogantly)
with a punishment (object of فَبَشِّرْهُ - give him glad tidings)
and they did (connected to ءَامَنُوا - they believed)
ones who are remaining forever (describes the believers in Paradise)
he created (subject of the sentence, followed by السَّمٰوٰتِ - the heavens)
the heavens (object of خَلَقَ - He created)
you all see it (referring to the heavens/السَّمٰوٰتِ)
mountains (that Allah placed in the earth)
that/so that (connects to تَمِيدَ - it would sway)
with/by you all (referring to those who see the mountains in تَرَوْنَهَا)
and he spread out/scattered widely (connected to أَلْقَىٰ)
from/of (connects كُلِّ to what comes before it)
water (object of أَنزَلْنَا - we sent down)
and so we made (something) grow (after sending down water from the sky)
in it (referring to الأرض - the earth)
from (connects كُلِّ to what comes before it)
so show me! (command to a group)
the ones who act unjustly (as subject)
for/to Allah (connected to ٱشْكُرْ - give thanks)
he rejected/was ungrateful (opposite of يَشْكُرْ in this ayah)
then indeed (connects to يَشْكُرُ - he thanks)
praiseworthy (describing Allah as deserving all praise)
and when (introducing Luqman's advice to his son)
to his son (who لُقْمٰنُ is speaking to)
he advises him (Luqman advising his son)
associate partners! (negative command - don't do this)
with/by Allah (object of تُشْرِكْ - associate partners)
the act of associating partners (object of تُشْرِكْ)
surely a wrongdoing (describing الشِّرْكَ/associating partners with Allah)
the human being (object of وَصَّيْنَا - we instructed)
his mother (subject of حَمَلَتْهُ - carried him)
upon (describing the state of weakness in وَهْنٍ)
with weakness (describing how أُمُّهُۥ carried the child)
in, within (connected to عَامَيْنِ - two years)
that (introduces the command اشْكُرْ - be grateful)
to/for me (connected to ٱشْكُرْ - give thanks)
they both tried with you (referring to parents trying to influence their child)
that (introduces what they are trying to make you do)
you join (as partners with بِى - with Me)
for you (object of تُشْرِكَ - associate partners)
so do not/then do not (negates تُطِعْهُمَا)
in a kind/good manner (describing how to treat parents in this ayah)
whoever (the path of the one who)
to me (connected to مَرْجِعُكُمْ - your return)
Then I will inform you all (about ما كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ - what you used to do)
with what/whatever (that you used to do)
you all were (referring to what you all used to do)
indeed it (referring to the tiny deed mentioned after)
a mustard seed (object of مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِّنْ - 'weight of a seed of')
then it is (referring to حَبَّةٍ - seed)
or (connecting صَخْرَةٍ with السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)
in the heavens (location in فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)
he comes/is coming (command form after فَ)
with it/her (referring to حَبَّةٍ - a seed)
indeed/truly (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is لَطِيفٌ خَبِيرٌ)
Allah (as the object of يَأْتِ - He brings)
Most Gentle and Kind (a name of Allah)
and command! (to one male) (connected to أَقِمِ - establish)
and stop! (command to stop something wrong)
of the wrong/evil deed (object of عَنِ)
and be patient! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
afflicted you/befell you (referring to what befalls you in life)
that (used to point to something mentioned)
of determination (possessed by الْأُمُورِ - the matters)
walk (as in 'do not walk') (connected to مَرَحًا/proudly)
proudly/arrogantly (describing how not to walk in وَلَا تَمْشِ)
he loves (subject of لا in لا يُحِبُّ)
every, all (object of لا يُحِبُّ - does not love)
an arrogant one (described in this ayah as someone Allah does not love)
your walking (object of اقصد/be moderate in)
and lower! (command to one person to lower their voice)
your voice (object of وَٱغْضُضْ مِن - lower from)
he made someone deny/caused to deny
of the sounds/voices (after the word أَنكَرَ - most disagreeable)
Have (you) not...? (expecting 'yes, we have' as answer)
you (all) see (after أَلَمْ meaning 'do you not')
Allah (as the object of أَنَّ - that)
He made (something) completely subservient (to لَكُم - for you all)
in (location of what is in ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)
and he made (something) complete/abundant (connected to سَخَّرَ - subjected)
apparent/visible (feminine, as a description of نِعَمَهُۥ/His favors)
he sent down (what اللَّهُ sent down)
they said (responding to what was told to them)
Satan (as the subject who يَدْعُوهُمْ/calls them)
he calls/invites them (referring to those who follow their forefathers instead of Allah's revelation)
of the blazing fire (connected to عَذَابِ meaning 'punishment of')
a doer of good (describes someone who submits)
the most firm/reliable (feminine) (describes العروة - the handhold)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes before)
then we will inform them emphatically (about بِمَا عَمِلُوٓا۟)
we let them enjoy greatly (present tense) (followed by قَلِيلًا - a little while)
for a little while (describing نُمَتِّعُهُمْ - We let them enjoy)
you asked them (about مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ - who created the heavens and earth)
who (asking about the creator of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)
he created (subject of لَيَقُولُنَّ - they will surely say)
they will surely say (with strong emphasis)
all praise (subject of this part of the ayah)
most of them (subject of لَا يَعْلَمُونَ)
they know (referring to most people mentioned in أَكْثَرُهُمْ)
to/for Allah (belongs what is in السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)
of the heavens (possessed by/belonging to اللَّهِ)
and the earth (possessed by/connected to something)
indeed/verily (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is الْغَنِىُّ الْحَمِيدُ)
The Completely Free from Need (subject of this phrase)
from (connects شَجَرَةٍ to what comes before it)
he extends it (referring to البَحْرُ - the sea)
from (connecting شَجَرَةٍ to what comes after)
it (feminine) ran out (referring to كَلِمٰتُ - words)
words (subject of the sentence, belonging to اللَّهِ)
indeed/certainly (emphasizes that اللَّهَ is عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ)
Allah (as the object being described in this ayah)
not at all (negates خَلْقُكُمْ and بَعْثُكُمْ)
you see (in أَلَمْ تَرَ - 'Do you not see?')
Allah (the one true deity being acted upon)
he causes to enter (Allah is making something enter into something else)
the night (object of يُولِجُ - merges into)
and he causes to enter (connected to يُولِجُ in previous phrase)
the daytime (object of يُولِجُ - merges/causes to enter)
and he made (something) serve (a purpose) (controls الشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ - the sun and moon)
a set term (running to it يَجْرِىٓ إِلَىٰٓ)
and that (connects to previous statement about Allah controlling day and night)
Allah (as the object of أَنَّ - that)
and that/and indeed (connects to previous statement about Allah being the Truth)
the falsehood (opposite of ٱلْحَقُّ/the truth in this ayah)
and that/and indeed (emphasizes ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْعَلِىُّ)
Allah (as the object being referred to)
The Most High (one of Allah's names)
The Most Great (divine attribute of Allah describing His supreme greatness)
you see (in أَلَمْ تَرَ - 'do you not see?')
it/she flows/sails (referring to الْفُلْكَ, the ship)
the sea (location where ٱلْفُلْكَ تَجْرِى/the ships sail)
so that he shows you all (referring to Allah showing His signs)
indeed, certainly (introduces a statement in this ayah)
they called upon (subject of calling upon اللَّهَ)
Allah (as the one being called upon in دَعَوُا۟)
for him, to him (referring to الدِّينَ - the religion)
the religion/way of life (object of دَعَوُا۟)
then when (connects to previous ayah about waves covering them)
He saved them (referring to when Allah saved the people from the waves)
to the land (after إِلَى meaning He saved them to/towards the land)
then from them (referring to those who were saved)
with/by our signs (object of يَجْحَدُ - denies/rejects)
except (introduces كُلُّ خَتَّارٍ كَفُورٍ as an exception)
your Lord (addressing all people in ayah)
and all of you fear! (plural command)
from/on behalf of (connects جَازٍ with وَالِدِ)
a born one (describing someone in this ayah who cannot help their parent)
one who repays (in a possessive relationship)
so/then do not (connected to يَجْزِى - rewards/helps)
definitely deceive you all (connected to الْحَيَوٰةُ الدُّنْيَا)
and he sends down repeatedly (subject of إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ)
and he knows (connected to يُنَزِّلُ - he sends down)
in (location of ما 'what' in the wombs)
what thing (emphasizing the question in تَكْسِبُ 'it earns')
a self, a soul, a person
by which/what (asking about location in أَرْضٍ)
All-Aware (as an independent quality of Allah)
